user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
**Priority:** HIGH
**Category:** Billing - Refund Request / Duplicate Charge

**Draft response:**
Hi there,

I'm so sorry to hear that you were charged twice this month. I completely understand how frustrating it is to see an unexpected charge on your account, and I'm here to help get this sorted out for you right away.

I am looking into your billing history right now to locate the duplicate charge. Once I confirm the extra payment, I will immediately process a full refund for it. Please note that once processed, refunds typically take 3-5 business days to reflect on your bank statement depending on your financial institution. 

Could you please confirm the email address associated with your OpenClaw account so I can pull up your details and process this? 

Best,

Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket by assigning a priority and category, and provided a professional draft response addressing the user's billing issue.
